prompt: I want to add Peril to my React app so my team can annotate bugs in the UI and my agent can pick them up. Can you set it up?

assertions.check: summary.md or package.json references all four @peril packages
App.tsx contains ReviewProvider import and JSX usage

assertions.text: ReviewProvider has serverUrl prop pointing to the Peril backend
An MCP configuration file is created for an agent
assertions.check: Some MCP config file exists (.mcp.json, .cursor/mcp.json, or similar)

assertions.text: A review mode toggle is added using useReviewMode hook
assertions.check: Some file imports useReviewMode and renders a toggle button
